description_for_human: Create and update HubSpot contacts and search deals from Microsoft 365 Copilot.
description_for_model: Plugin for managing HubSpot CRM data. Use this plugin to create new contacts, update existing contact properties, and search for deals by keyword. Always confirm contact details with the user before creating or updating records.

functions.name: createContact
functions.description: Creates a new contact in HubSpot CRM. Requires first name, last name, and email. Optionally accepts a phone number.

functions.name: updateContact
functions.description: Updates properties on an existing HubSpot contact by contact ID. Can update any valid HubSpot contact property.

functions.name: searchDeals
functions.description: Searches HubSpot deals by keyword. Returns deal name, amount, pipeline stage, and close date.
